description: The largest and most spectacular temple festival in Kerala with elephant processions.

name: Idukki Arch Dam
description: Asia's first arch dam between the Kuravan and Kurathi hills.

name: Varkala Beach
description: A beach with dramatic cliffs of Cenozoic sedimentary formation, known for mineral springs.

name: Marari Beach
description: A secluded beach with swaying palms listed among the best beaches in the world.

name: Palolem Beach
description: A crescent-shaped beach in South Goa known for its dolphin tours and kayaking.

name: Anjuna Beach
description: A famous beach known for its flea market and trance music scene.

name: Fort Aguada
description: A 17th-century Portuguese fort with a lighthouse overlooking Sinquerim Beach.

name: Lakshadweep Islands
description: A tropical archipelago with some of the most pristine coral reefs in India.

name: Hemis National Park
description: South Asia's largest national park and home to the elusive snow leopard.

name: Magnetic Hill
description: An optical illusion hill where vehicles appear to roll uphill against gravity.

name: Tso Moriri
description: A high-altitude lake at 4,522 metres, less crowded than Pangong with migratory birds.

name: Pattaya Beach Bharatpur
description: Keoladeo Ghana National Park, a UNESCO site for migratory birds.

name: Nathdwara
description: A temple town with the Shrinathji Temple dedicated to Lord Krishna.

name: Chand Baori
description: One of the deepest stepwells in the world with 3,500 narrow steps and 13 stories.

name: Bikaner Junagarh Fort
description: An unassailed fort with ornate palaces in the heart of the Thar Desert.

name: Tarkarli
description: A pristine beach destination known for scuba diving and water sports.

name: Sinhagad Fort
description: A hill fortress known for its strategic importance in Maratha history.

name: Matheran
description: Asia's only automobile-free hill station, a preserved eco-sensitive zone.

name: Bhaja Caves
description: Ancient Buddhist rock-cut caves from the 2nd century BCE.

name: Karla Caves
description: The largest Hinayana Buddhist chaitya in India.

name: Rajmachi Fort
description: A twin-fort accessible by a night trek, popular during monsoon season.

name: Puri Beach
description: A sacred beach along the Bay of Bengal with the annual Rath Yatra festival.

name: Pipli
description: A handicraft village famous for colorful appliqué work and umbrella crafts.

name: Dhauladhar Range
description: A Himalayan mountain range with trekking trails to Triund and Indrahar Pass.

name: Manikaran
description: A pilgrimage center with hot springs sacred to both Hindus and Sikhs.

name: Tirthan Valley
description: A pristine valley near the Great Himalayan National Park for trout fishing and trekking.

name: Bir Billing
description: The paragliding capital of India and second best paragliding site in the world.

name: Devprayag
description: The sacred confluence where the Alaknanda and Bhagirathi rivers merge to form the Ganges.

name: Kedarnath Trek
description: A 16-km spiritual trek from Gaurikund to the Kedarnath Temple.

name: Kanatal
description: A secluded hill station with apple orchards and views of Himalayan peaks.

name: Binsar
description: A wildlife sanctuary with a 300-km panoramic view of the Himalayan range.

name: Parashar Lake
description: A high-altitude lake with a floating island and pagoda-style temple at 2,730m.

name: Chandratal Lake
description: Moon Lake, a crescent-shaped high-altitude lake at 4,300m in Spiti Valley.

name: Bhedaghat
description: Marble canyon gorge on the Narmada River with boat rides between towering rocks.

name: Deogarh
description: Home to the Dashavatara Temple, one of the earliest Hindu stone temples in India.

name: Jhansi Fort
description: The fort of Rani Lakshmibai, a key site of the 1857 Indian Rebellion.

name: Chitrakoot Falls Chhattisgarh
description: The widest waterfall in India, often compared to Niagara Falls.

name: Hogenakkal Falls
description: Carbonatite rocks waterfalls known as the Niagara of India with coracle rides.

name: Yelagiri
description: A small hill station with a lake, rose garden and adventure activities.

name: Valparai
description: A hill station on the Anaimalai Hills with tea and coffee estates.

name: Lepchajagat
description: A tiny hamlet near Darjeeling surrounded by oak and magnolia forests.

name: Sandakphu
description: The highest peak in West Bengal offering views of four of the five tallest peaks in the world.

name: Manas National Park
description: A UNESCO Natural World Heritage site known for the rare golden langur and pygmy hog.

name: Sivasagar
description: The former capital of the Ahom Kingdom with Rang Ghar amphitheatre and Talatal Ghar palace.

name: Nokrek National Park
description: A UNESCO Biosphere Reserve and home to the world's rarest citrus fruit, Memang Narang.

name: Keibul Lamjao National Park
description: The only floating national park in the world, home to the endangered Sangai deer.

name: Mawsynram
description: The wettest place on Earth by average annual rainfall with stunning limestone caves.

name: Ross Island
description: The former administrative headquarters of the British in the Andamans, now reclaimed by nature.
